author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Shipped in 7621bd2f. Dropped the <owner>/ subdir from both clone paths. Repos now land flat at ~/<repo> — next to the user's manual clones (~/crosslink, ~/ferrotorch, ~/OpenClaudia). Slug identity on the dashboard keeps owner/repo (that's hub identity); only the on-disk path flattens. Collision on same repo-name across orgs falls back to the existing 'already tracked' / skipped-list path. Verified end-to-end via POST /clone of rust-lang/mdBook → /home/doll/mdBook.
